overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing third-person vehicle driving through Night City on a rainy night. The vehicle navigates wet neon-lit streets, stops at a traffic intersection, and continues under an elevated transit line with distinctive teal lighting.

events.description: approaching red traffic light at intersection
vehicle comes to complete stop behind black car at red light

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets and decelerating to stop at a red traffic light

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead and stopping at the intersection

entered.detail: towering futuristic buildings with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
tall structure with bright cyan vertical neon lighting
commercial building facade with purple and pink neon signage
rain-slicked multi-lane street reflecting colorful neon lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives down a wide, rain-soaked avenue in a futuristic city at night. Tall glass skyscrapers rise ahead while a distinctive vertical neon pillar glows cyan on the right. The camera follows the car as it slows and stops at a red traffic light, with wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon signage from surrounding buildings.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
vehicle accelerates forward through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the red light then accelerating through the intersection when the signal changes

notable_agents.action: pedestrians crossing the street in the marked crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped crosswalk markings across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light at a busy intersection, with pedestrians visible crossing in the crosswalk. When the light turns green, the car accelerates forward through the intersection. The vertical neon pillar recedes into the distance on the right as the vehicle moves through the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under elevated transit line

events.description: entering covered roadway beneath elevated transit structure with teal neon lighting
exiting covered area back into open street with palm trees

agents.ego_description: driving under the elevated transit line and continuing down the multi-lane avenue with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving alongside in the right lane

entered.detail: futuristic overpass with distinctive teal neon underlighting
large red digital billboard displaying Japanese characters in white
tall palm trees lining the left side of the avenue

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives beneath an elevated transit structure illuminated by striking teal neon lights, passing a large red billboard with Japanese text. Exiting the covered roadway, the scene opens onto a palm-lined avenue with moderate traffic. The camera follows the car as it navigates through the wet streets, with the glass skyscrapers now visible ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from a neon-lit avenue to a covered transit corridor and finally into a palm-lined boulevard. It begins with the vehicle gliding down a wide avenue flanked by glass skyscrapers, slowing to a halt at a red light where the wet pavement mirrors a glowing cyan neon pillar. As the light turns green, the car accelerates through a busy intersection with crossing pedestrians, leaving the vertical pillar behind in the distance. The scene then shifts as the vehicle passes beneath an elevated transit structure illuminated by striking teal lights and a large red Japanese billboard before emerging from the cover. Finally, the camera follows the car onto an open, palm-lined avenue with moderate traffic, heading toward distant skyscrapers under the night sky.
